Section.Title: Description
Section.Paragraph: The AppendMatrix method appends a matrix field to the state buffer layout.

Section.Title: Usage
Section.Code: void AppendMatrix(const Marshal::In<std::string>& fieldName, DataType type, size_t width, size_t height, size_t arraySize = 0);

ArgumentList.ArgumentListEntry: The name to assign to the matrix field in the state buffer layout.
The scalar data type of each matrix component.
The number of columns in the matrix.
The number of rows in the matrix.
The optional array element count. Use 0 for a non-array field.
